title: Rename device - new name on the FMD disconnected card
scenario: Renamed device name does not update on Find My Device disconnected card after renaming in Settings and disconnecting
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure the target Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
4. In Device Settings, locate and tap the 'Rename' option (or the pencil/edit icon next to the device name).
5. Enter a new name for the device and confirm/save the change.
6. Disconnect the device (e.g., turn off the device, move out of range, or use the app to disconnect).
7. On the Home screen, locate the 'Find My Device' (FMD) section or card showing disconnected devices.
8. Observe the device name displayed on the disconnected FMD card.
expected: The disconnected FMD card displays the new (renamed) device name.
